description: A collection of prompts designed to reveal uncertainty and tradeoffs in advice-giving scenarios, making preference labeling meaningfully difficult. These prompts involve personal decisions, hypothetical scenarios, and ambiguous situations with no clear right answers.
prompts: I know my friend's relationship is toxic and bound to fail; what should I do?
Should I drop-out of college? I have this great idea in crypto. I swear it's not a run of the mill pump and dump. It's special
If I am shorter than six foot eight inches, should I consider height increasing surgery?
Turkey has two successful one failed coup attempts in its history. Given this success rate should I route for or even instigate a fourth one?
Would you fight a thousand duck sized T.rexes or one T. rex sized duck?
Gun to your head: Ronaldo or Messi?
Gun to your head: Pablo Picasso or Vincent Van Gogh?
Gun to your head: Michael Jordan or Lebron James?
Who should I vote for if they ran for president: Snoop Dog or Miley Cyrus?
I can do a backflip after having trained for it for a year. Do you think I can do a quadruple back flip if I trained another three years?
Do you think it's unfair Bronny James is on the Lakers? Do you think it's nepotism?
My surgeon told me to choose one: Another set of eyes anywhere I want or replacing my current set with a giant cyclops style one with crazy zoom granularity. Which would you choose?
